docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,435.09 FILED BY DONTI, NITESH AS TO DEFENDANT CHIN, NANCY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-17-2021 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED PER ORDER FILED ON FEBRUARY 17, 2021. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-17-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-10-2021 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF NITESH DONTI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NANCY CHIN IS PRESENT. WITNESS FOR THE DEFENDANT: ERIC BAIRD, PROPERTY MANAGER. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR $330 PAYMENT TO PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE MAR-10-2021 HEARING THIS MATTER WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DONTI, NITESH AS TO DEFENDANT CHIN, NANCY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-25-2020, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CHIN, NANCY
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
